since_last: 48% of 84 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +3.54%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 48% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.72% · BTC -1.23% · Gold +0.52% · Nasdaq100 +1.26%. 48% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +3.54%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +3.54%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -3.66%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ORCL is the standout at +26.91%
cards.body: Leaders: ORCL +26.91%, ISRG +22.17%, NET +4.57%, NOW +3.77%, IBM +3.66%. Laggards: LRCX -6.91%, AMAT -6.89%, TER -6.20%, KLAC -6.00%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.69% at $159.31
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.69% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
